prestazioni: VR30DDTT 3.0L twin-turbo V6 engine with a custom billet aluminum block reinforcement sleeve kit from Tomei, supporting 22 psi of boost via a Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger (88mm compressor wheel, 1.15 A/R turbine housing) and a TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegate for precise boost control

Full Motec M150 ECU with custom VR30DDTT-specific fuel and ignition maps, paired with a Plex Tuning S-DI direct injection controller to optimize fuel delivery at 1,200+ hp targets, utilizing ID1700x injectors and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup for crankcase ventilation

OS Giken 4.375:1 final drive LSD differential with billet aluminum housing, mated to a Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox (6-speed, dog-ring engagement) and a Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch with 3.5-inch diameter, designed for 1,500 Nm torque capacity
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS Q60 widebody conversion kit (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap and exposed carbon weave accents on the hood and roof

Custom fabricated titanium exhaust system by Burns Stainless (4-inch diameter, dual-wall construction) with quad 120mm titanium tips from Agency Power, routed through a custom rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (Pandem) for optimized downforce

OMP Carbon Kevlar racing seats with 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses, paired with a custom roll cage by The Phirm (chromoly steel, TIG-welded, 6-point design with integrated fire suppression system) and a carbon fiber dashboard overlay by Seibon
